data.title: Investigate and clean dirty gptme-contrib submodule hook state
data.description:
## Summary

Investigate the dirty `gptme-contrib` submodule state in this workspace, especially the local change under `dotfiles/.config/git/hooks/pre-commit`, and decide whether it should be upstreamed, reverted, or explicitly documented as local-only.

## Context

The first autonomous-run sanity review found that local verification currently depends on a dirty submodule state that would not be represented by a normal superproject push. That makes future worktree/PR-based work less trustworthy.

## Acceptance Criteria

* the current submodule diff is captured and understood
* any intended hook-policy change is moved to the correct repo/worktree or reverted locally
* workspace validation does not rely on uncommitted submodule-only drift
* follow-up guidance is documented if the submodule is intentionally customized locally
